message:
fix(i18n): restructure app to use [locale] folder for next-intl

Fixes production 404 errors by properly implementing next-intl App Router structure.

Changes:
- Move all page directories under src/app/[locale]/
- Create [locale]/layout.tsx with NextIntlClientProvider
- Simplify root layout.tsx to minimal html/body wrapper
- Add searchPromptsByText function to registry.ts

The previous structure had pages directly in src/app/ without the required
[locale] segment, causing next-intl routing to fail and return 404 for all pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
